away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Paige Bueckers
players.injury_comment: Bueckers tweaked her right ankle during Thursday's 85-70 win over the Mercury. Head coach Jose Fernandez reported that the star guard underwent treatment on Friday night and Saturday morning while labeling her as day-to-day moving ahead. As a result, it appears Bueckers could be back on the floor for Monday's meeting with the Aces. In the meantime, Aziaha James and JJ Quinerly are the favorites to see a bump in minutes.

players.name: Odyssey Sims
players.injury_comment: Sims exited last Friday's win over the Sparks in a wheelchair and has been ruled out for a third consecutive contest due to a left ankle injury. She is without a clear timetable for a return and can be considered week-to-week until the Wings offer an update on her status.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Jordan Harrison
players.injury_comment: Harrison hasn't played since the season opener May 9 against the Sky and is eligible to appear in up to 12 regular-season games under a developmental contract. The rookie's next opportunity to suit up will come Monday against the Lynx.

players.name: Nyadiew Puoch
players.injury_comment: Puoch was listed as questionable but has since been downgraded, resulting in her first absence of the 2026 campaign. Her next opportunity to suit up will come Monday versus the Lynx. In the meantime, Frieda Buhner and Emily Engstler are the favorites to see an uptick in minutes.
